tasks.description: Implement skeleton-config bootstrap per DEC-0001 / FGAP-001. In packages/pi-context/src/context.ts add writeSkeletonConfig (never-clobber, mints substrate_id, writes via writeConfigForDir) + isSkeletonConfig predicate, and change adoptConception's guard to if(existing && !isSkeletonConfig(existing)). In src/index.ts have initProject (248-298) and switchAndCreate (548-575) call writeSkeletonConfig after the dir-scaffold loop and update their completion/notify messages. In src/context-sdk.ts add the 'skeleton' state to the BootstrapStatus union and to deriveBootstrapState's ordered checks. In src/ops-registry.ts update the context-bootstrap-state (and context-init / context-accept-all as needed) description strings. Rework accept-all.test.ts idempotent + 'no defaults' tests, keep the no-config test in context-sdk.test.ts and add a skeleton-state test, add unit tests for isSkeletonConfig + init/switch-c skeleton writes + first amend-config add on a skeleton. Full completion sequence: build, check, test, runtime demo against a throwaway substrate, adversarial probe, regen skills. Implemented by a foreground coding subagent from the approved plan; orchestrator runs all npm and is sole git writer; per-step commit.
tasks.notes: Implemented at ab05a0e (pi-context skeleton-config bootstrap). Build/check/test green; runtime-demoed via the cli (custom path without accept-all; init->accept-all id-preservation + idempotence); a fresh adversarial re-audit found the isSkeletonConfig registry-class fix complete with no new regression.

tasks.description: Implement switch identity reconciliation per DEC-0003 / FGAP-003: switchToExisting and switchAndCreate register config.substrate_id -> active dir via registerSubstrate when the id is absent from the project-root registry; a present-but-different-dir entry continues to raise substrate_id_registry_mismatch. Tests: switch to an unregistered-but-present-config substrate -> registered + context-validate clean; mismatch case preserved. Full completion sequence (build/check/test/runtime-demo/adversarial/skills). Via coding subagent; orchestrator runs all npm + is sole git writer; per-step commit.
tasks.notes: Implemented at 17d9a3b. reconcileActiveSubstrateRegistration wired into all three switch engine functions (switchToExisting, switchAndCreate, switchToPrevious). Build/check/test green; cli runtime demo across all three paths (register-if-absent, mismatch-preserved, switch- heals pruned-previous); a fresh adversarial re-audit (after the probe found switchToPrevious unwired) confirmed all three paths consistent + no-previous error path intact + no new defect. One of the two items in the 0.29.0 cut.

tasks.description: Implement the substrate clone/import arc per DEC-0002 / FGAP-002 / FEAT-001: cloneSubstrate library fn (copy config + all blocks + relations.json + objects/ into the destination dir; mint a fresh substrate_id; record a substrate_derived_from_substrate edge; write a provenance-bearing registry entry) + Pi tool + CLI + orchestrator script as one dual-surface unit; register the substrate_derived_from_substrate relation_type in config; extend the registry schema/type with origin/provenance fields; refine the SoT-drift invariant (context-sdk.ts:1685+) to distinguish native-lost-registry / foreign-import / genuine drift. Full completion sequence. Via coding subagent; orchestrator runs all npm + is sole git writer; per-step commit.

Implement the git merge driver + post-merge integrity pass per DEC-0004 / FGAP-004 / FEAT-002: .gitattributes registration (substrate files -> merge=pi-context) + a [merge "pi-context"] driver entry; the driver entrypoint consuming git's %O/%A/%B/%P and writing a data-model-valid 3-way merge (items matched by id/oid, field-kind dispatch incl. the convergent sequence field via TASK-005, edge-set merge on relations.json, config/schema merge); a post-merge hook / merge-finalize command doing cross-block referential integrity + full invariant + lens revalidation and emitting a typed conflict set. Driver + per-file merge logic live in block-api; the post-merge pass is a git hook / CLI command. Merge-base, branches, refs, cherry-pick are git's, not reimplemented. Full completion sequence. Via coding subagent; orchestrator runs all npm + is sole git writer; per-step commit.

Implement the convergent ordered-sequence field-kind per DEC-0005 / FGAP-005 / FEAT-003: non-interleaving Fugue-class sequence CRDT over item-refs (dense immutable per-element position identifiers, insert mints one id + mutates no neighbor); Kleppmann move-CRDT position register resolved by hybrid logical clock (stable element identity; concurrent same-element moves converge); HLC for replica-independent same-gap ordering + move resolution; sort-on-read projection to a plain ordered ref-array + translation of array-position hand-edits to CRDT ops, through block-api; declared sequence-field kind recognized by schema; CRDT state stored in the owning <block>.json. Plugs into the substrate merge driver's field-merge dispatch. Full completion sequence. Via coding subagent; orchestrator runs all npm + is sole git writer; per-step commit. Depends on the substrate merge driver (TASK-004).

Implement DispatchContext threading through the op-execution contract per DEC-0006 / FGAP-008: add a ctx/writer channel to OpDefinition.run + registerAll (thread the pi ExtensionContext verified identity) + the pi-context-cli dispatch (build DispatchContext from --writer); forward ctx in all 10 ctx-dropping op handlers (append/update/remove-block-item, the nested trio, write-block, append-relation, amend-config, write-schema) and the pi-workflows step-block.ts writers; fix context-archive's declared-but-ignored writer. Full completion sequence. Via coding subagent; orchestrator runs all npm + is sole git writer; per-step commit.

Complete the op-registry coverage of the library write surface per DEC-0006 / FGAP-009 / FGAP-006 as dual-surface units (library + op + CLI + orchestrator script): add the missing removeRelation library primitive + a remove-relation / replace-relation op (closing FGAP-006), and ops for writeRelations / upsertItemInBlock / writeConfig / writeSchema+updateSchema / registerSubstrate+writeRegistry / writeBootstrapPointer+flipBootstrapPointer / bulk appendRelations as the surface warrants; run context-validate after edge mutations. Full completion sequence. Via coding subagent; orchestrator runs all npm + is sole git writer; per-step commit.

Add a library<->op-registry<->orchestrator-script parity/coverage test per DEC-0006 / FGAP-010: fail when a library write fn has no op, or an op drops the ctx / optional params (dryRun, ordinal, ...) its underlying library fn or orchestrator-script sibling forwards; wire into husky pre-commit + CI. Full completion sequence. Via coding subagent; orchestrator runs all npm + is sole git writer; per-step commit.
